Northwatch Systems builds Blackridge, a Token Forensics Engine / Gateway for enterprise inference spend. Blackridge sits between AI applications and model providers to make inference spend attributable, explainable, and controllable.

The one-workflow assessment is the entry motion for evaluating Blackridge. It uses logs, traces, gateway exports, provider events, runtime metadata, and scoped runtime evidence to determine whether Blackridge should be deployed for ongoing control.

Primary public pages:
